ddls:
CREATE TABLE "migrations" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration event */,
  "from_state" TEXT /* State of origin */,
  "from_county" TEXT /* County of origin */,
  "to_state" TEXT /* Destination state */,
  "to_county" TEXT /* Destination county */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of migrants */,
  "from_lat" REAL /* Latitude of origin */,
  "from_lon" REAL /* Longitude of origin */,
  "to_lat" REAL /* Latitude of destination */,
  "to_lon" REAL /* Longitude of destination */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year in which the migration event occurred */,
  "month" INTEGER /* The month in which the migration event occurred */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* The age group of the migrants */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The gender of the migrants */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* The ethnicity of the migrants */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* The highest level of education completed by the migrants */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* The income bracket of the migrants */,
  "reason_for_migration" TEXT /* The primary reason for migration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_to_state FOREIGN KEY ("to_state") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_from_state FOREIGN KEY ("from_state") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated state code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* The capital city of the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* The Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* The unemployment rate in the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* The median income in the state */,
  "primary_industry" TEXT /* The primary industry in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Full name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the county belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* The county seat (main city) of the county */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* The median home value in the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* The poverty rate in the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* The median age of the population in the county */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* The crime rate in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
